body:
This commit addresses a bug in GeoMakie.jl (https://github.com/MakieOrg/GeoMakie.jl/issues/330). I found experimentally that changing the order of what to plot avoids the bug.

I verified offline that the plots can be made using diagnostics from https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/4573.
title: Workaround for GeoMakie bug
